text:
No results were returned for that exact title search. Combined with the automated checker findings — the arXiv ID 2406.13163 points to an entirely different paper ("LLMatDesign: Autonomous Materials Discovery with Large Language Models") with completely different authors — this reference is fabricated.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No web page was found containing the exact title "Swissprot-aug: Augmenting protein function descriptions for language model training." The cited arXiv ID 2406.13163 actually belongs to a completely different paper with different authors, confirming this is a hallucinated reference.
LINK: NONE
